content.en:
The Yunzi Divine Maiden sighed, but she didn't fight with Ye Tian for this obsidian gold vein, after all, she had already promised Ye Tian, and it was not easy to regret it.

Besides, if she wants to leave here, she has to rely on Ye Tian, even if it is a precious treasure, she can't do this, otherwise if Ye Tian leaves her here, she will be trapped for a long time.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian continued to bombard here, and soon a complete ore vein was revealed.

Obsidian is too heavy to weigh by weight, and this obsidian vein as a whole is about a few thousand cubic meters in size.

With so much obsidian, its value is unimaginable.

"At least it's worth four or five half-way weapons!"

The Yun Zi Divine Maiden thought extremely distressed.

Her entire net worth is far less than that of this obsidian gold vein!

"Cloud Purple Divine Maiden, can the Gold Devouring Divine Power refine obsidian?" Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" Yun Zi Divine Maiden nodded, "However, even if you can really practice the Gold Devouring Divine Power, there is no need to devour too much Obsidian, when you can't use Obsidian to improve the Gold Devouring Divine Power, don't devour it anymore, otherwise it will be wasted!"

"Got it!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, he directly collected this obsidian gold into the small universe in his body.

For this obsidian gold vein, he already had a plan, a small part of it was used to cultivate the gold devouring divine power, a part was used to trade in exchange for the chaos divine power, and the last part was kept for refining the half-way weapon in the future.

This obsidian gold vein is undoubtedly the most precious thing here, and no matter how Ye Tian and Yun Zi Divine Maiden searched for it next, they didn't find anything good.

"It's time to leave!"

Ye Tiandao.

The Yunzi Divine Maiden had long wanted to leave, and when she heard Ye Tian say this, she naturally agreed immediately.

With the assistance of Ye Tian's great god arithmetic, Ye Tian took the Yunzi Divine Maiden for a while to finally leave this forbidden place and come to the outside world.

"Your Highness, you're finally out!"

The Purple Shirt Heavenly Monarch said excitedly.

Over the years, she has been worried about the safety of the Yunzi Goddess, if the Yunzi Divine Daughter has a little situation in the forbidden land, she will not be able to make up for her sins!

Fortunately, the Yunzi Divine Maiden came out safely!

"Go back!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden said excitedly.

Seeing this, the Purple Shirt Heavenly Monarch understood that the Yun Zi Divine Maiden must have obtained the ice-free fire, and immediately took the Yun Zi Divine Maiden back.

The most important thing at the moment is to let the Yunzi Divine Maiden go back to retreat and cultivate.

Maybe by the time the Yunzi Divine Maiden came out, she would already be an eight-star god general.

And Ye Tian also returned to the Void Heaven Hall and started a new round of retreat.

Long before he came out, the Yun Zi Divine Maiden had already given him the Gold Devouring Divine Power and the corresponding innate origin things, so after he went back, he immediately began to cultivate the Gold Devouring Divine Power.

After the 2000 years.

Ye Tian finally practiced the gold-devouring supernatural power, which can be regarded as a preliminary obtaining the prototype of the gold-devouring supernatural power.

If this Chaos Divine Power were to refine metal, it would be powerless at all.

As a result, Ye Tian began to devour all kinds of metals.

He has collected a lot of metals, and last time he even got a lot of precious ores in the Secret World, this time he devoured and refined them all, and at the same time began to refine obsidian.

However, obsidian is very strong, and even with the power of the Chaos Divine Power, it will take a long time to devour a little obsidian.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's gold-devouring divine power became more and more powerful, but due to the level of the gold-devouring divine power, it was only the prototype, so the final level of armor and weapons was not too high.

"The level of the super Chaos Spirit Treasure is second only to the Chaos Treasure, and the power is good!"

Ye Tian was very satisfied.

At the very least, he doesn't have a super-grade Chaos Spirit Treasure yet, and the Ancient Demon Tower is a little more powerful than the super-grade Chaos Spirit Treasure, but he still hasn't been able to completely break through the Ancient Demon Tower, and only reached the eleventh layer.

Only by breaking through the thirteenth layer of the Ancient Demon Tower can the Ancient Demon Tower be refined, and it is said that those eight-star god generals who have just broken through have not been able to break through the Ancient Demon Tower, because their physical bodies are not strong enough, and their combat skills are average, even inferior to Ye Tian.

The gold-devouring divine power can be attacked, defended, and trapped, which is equivalent to allowing Ye Tian to have all kinds of magical powers, but unfortunately there are limitations, otherwise this chaotic divine power will be too awesome.

"It's time to condense the prototype of the Golden Dao!"

Ye Tian decided.

It took nearly 10,000 years for Ye Tian to condense the prototype of the Golden Dao, and it took another 10,000 years to successfully engrave a Dao pattern on the Void Heaven Dao Body, allowing the Void Heaven Dao Body to transform again.

This is still assisted by the arithmetic deduction of the Great God, so that he can cultivate so fast, otherwise if he wants to condense the prototype of the Great Dao and engrave the Dao pattern, it is simply not enough to have 100,000 years.

Last time, he was able to condense the Great Dao of Time and Space and the two Dao Patterns in succession in ten thousand years, with the help of the effect of the ancestral monument space, but now without the assistance of the ancestral monument space, this speed is incomparably fast.

"The seven-star peak god general!"

Ye Tian tested his strength and was immediately overjoyed.

It's a pity that he can't condense the three avenues of Defense Dao, Devouring Dao, and Flesh Dao now, otherwise it will affect the fundamental Dao, otherwise his strength will definitely be able to step into the eight-star god general.

"It's time to find someone to trade the high-grade Thunder Origin Thing!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Next, in the name of the Daozi of the Void Heaven Temple, he proposed a deal to other forces, trading obsidian gold for high-grade thunder origin things.

Obsidian is undoubtedly a universal treasure for some Heavenly Monarchs, but high-grade thunder origin things are not necessarily important.

So soon, Ye Tian got a transaction message.

"Black Heavenly Monarch!"

The Heavenly Monarch who traded with Ye Tian was not the Heavenly Monarch List, but he was not weak, but he was a late Heavenly Monarch cultivator, and his strength was far superior to that of the Heavenly Monarch who had just broken through.

On a starry sky continent not far from the Void Heaven Temple, Ye Tian made a deal with the Black Demon Heavenly Monarch.

"Wanfa Daozi, do you really have obsidian gold on you?"

The Black Celestial Monarch asked.

"Yes, how about exchanging a high-grade thunder origin item for 1 cubic of obsidian?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!"

The Black Slayer agreed.

One hand to the obsidian, the other hand to the high-grade thunder origin.

Soon, the two sides closed the deal and went their separate ways.

Throughout, neither asked about anything else.

When the high-grade thunder origin thing arrived, Ye Tian immediately went back to retreat.

Ten thousand years later, the three thousand thunder chaos divine powers were practiced by Ye Tian, and it took tens of thousands of years to successfully engrave the fourth Dao pattern on the Void Heaven Dao body-the Thunder Dao Pattern.

It's a pity that Ye Tian's strength did not reach the eight-star god general, but it was more than twice as powerful as in the past.
